prompt:
ANIME REGISTER (locked, identical across the whole book): render this as a modern cinematic cel-shaded anime illustration in the polished style of a high-end seinen anime film's key art. Bold, clean, confident linework; flat cel shading with crisp shadow shapes; luminous warm golden-hour lighting; richly painted atmospheric anime backgrounds with real depth; expressive but grounded, realistically-proportioned adult faces (NOT chibi, NOT super-deformed, no oversized eyes). Warm AITX orange (#ff4201) is the single signature accent color. Consistent medium line weight and soft rim-lighting throughout so every page reads as one coherent edition. Keep the faces faithful to the provided character reference images.

SCENE: April 2023, the very first meetup. About ten people on mismatched folding chairs in a plain, bare, borrowed room (NOT a branded venue, no wood wall). Michael and Jake stand at the front presenting warmly; an open laptop shows a Luma event page. Humble, warm, real, a little empty.

CHARACTER LIKENESS: Michael: lean and warm, olive skin, dark hair pulled into a low bun, thick dark mustache with light stubble, wearing a black AITX t-shirt (orange open-arms glyph + lowercase 'aitx' wordmark on the chest), black shorts, white sneakers. Jake: taller and athletic, short dark curly hair, neat short dark beard, wearing a navy quarter-zip pullover with a small orange aitx glyph on the chest, tan/khaki chinos, white sneakers.

NO user interface anywhere: no windows, menu bars, buttons, icons, toolbars, panels, form fields, or cursors; any screen shows only soft glow or vague painterly shapes. Devices are anatomically correct: a laptop's glowing display is on the screen side facing its user, never on the lid's outer shell. No garbled text; any incidental signage is clean and minimal. No extra fingers, no distorted faces.
